news_items.headline: White House says Trump will meet Xi in China in May
news_items.description: A long-awaited meeting between President Donald Trump and Chinese President Xi Jinping will take place in Beijing on May 14 and 15, the White House said.

news_items.headline: We're adding to an out-of-favor stock with limited exposure to Iran war upheaval
news_items.description: The stock has pulled back roughly 9% since the start of the conflict with Iran.

news_items.headline: We like the message of Meta's new executive stock plan — plus, a war beneficiary stock
news_items.description: The Investing Club holds its "Morning Meeting" every weekday at 10:20 a.m. ET.

news_items.headline: Jim Cramer's top 10 things to watch in the stock market Wednesday
news_items.description: If oil prices are falling, then it's hard to be negative about stocks.

news_items.headline: Sen. Warren: DOD answers show no anti-corruption protocols for Trump children
news_items.description: Democrats have been hotly critical of the Trump family's business dealings while President Donald Trump serves in the White House.

news_items.headline: Recession odds climb on Wall Street as economy shows cracks beneath the surface
news_items.description: Economists have pulled up their risk assessments of a contraction amid heightened uncertainty over geopolitical risk and a labor market slump.

news_items.headline: How the shadow fleet is capitalising on the chaos of war
news_items.description: The Iran conflict has offered the illicit oil trade a lifeline — while the easing of US sanctions widens a transatlantic rift

news_items.headline: Republicans launch new party-line bill for ICE, Iran war funding and election laws
news_items.description: Sen. Lindsey Graham, with Trump's backing, will craft another Republican reconciliation bill for ICE, military spending on the Iran war and the SAVE America Act...

news_items.headline: Why Trump may be eyeing Iran's Kharg Island — and why that's a risk
news_items.description: The U.S. could try to seize Iran's Kharg Island, an offshore terminal which 90% of its crude oil exports pass.
